nasb.text: All have turned aside, together they have become useless; There is none who does good, There is not even one.”

esv.text: All have turned aside; together they have become worthless; no one does good, not even one.”

cnv.text: 人人都偏離了正道，一同變成污穢； 沒有行善的，連一個也沒有。

ccb.text: 人人偏离正路，变得毫无价值。 没有人行善，一个也没有。

csbs.text: 人人都远离了正道， 一同成了无用的； 没有仁慈的， 连一个也没有。
